speaker: ANTONY
text: Eros! Mine armor, Eros!

speaker: CLEOPATRA
text: Sleep a little.

speaker: ANTONY
text: No, my chuck.—Eros, come, mine armor, Eros.

speaker: ANTONY
text: Come, good fellow, put thine iron on.

speaker: ANTONY
text: If fortune be not ours today, it is

speaker: ANTONY
text: Because we brave her. Come.

speaker: CLEOPATRA
text: Nay, I’ll help too.

speaker: CLEOPATRA
text: What’s this for?

speaker: ANTONY
text: Ah, let be, let be! Thou art

speaker: ANTONY
text: The armorer of my heart. False, false. This, this!

speaker: CLEOPATRA
text: Sooth, la, I’ll help. Thus it must be.

speaker: ANTONY
text: Well, well,

speaker: ANTONY
text: We shall thrive now.—Seest thou, my good fellow?

speaker: ANTONY
text: Go, put on thy defenses.

speaker: EROS
text: Briefly, sir.

speaker: CLEOPATRA
text: Is not this buckled well?

speaker: ANTONY
text: Rarely, rarely.

speaker: ANTONY
text: He that unbuckles this, till we do please

speaker: ANTONY
text: To daff ’t for our repose, shall hear a storm.—

speaker: ANTONY
text: Thou fumblest, Eros, and my queen’s a squire

speaker: ANTONY
text: More tight at this than thou. Dispatch.—O love,

speaker: ANTONY
text: That thou couldst see my wars today, and knew’st

speaker: ANTONY
text: The royal occupation, thou shouldst see

speaker: ANTONY
text: A workman in ’t.

speaker: ANTONY
text: Good morrow to thee. Welcome.

speaker: ANTONY
text: Thou look’st like him that knows a warlike charge.

speaker: ANTONY
text: To business that we love we rise betime

speaker: ANTONY
text: And go to ’t with delight.

speaker: SOLDIER
text: A thousand, sir,

speaker: SOLDIER
text: Early though ’t be, have on their riveted trim

speaker: SOLDIER
text: And at the port expect you.

speaker: CAPTAIN
text: The morn is fair. Good morrow, general.

speaker: ALL
text: Good morrow, general.

speaker: ANTONY
text: ’Tis well blown, lads.

speaker: ANTONY
text: This morning, like the spirit of a youth

speaker: ANTONY
text: That means to be of note, begins betimes.

speaker: ANTONY
text: So, so.—Come, give me that. This way.—Well said.—

speaker: ANTONY
text: Fare thee well, dame.

speaker: ANTONY
text: Whate’er becomes of me,

speaker: ANTONY
text: This is a soldier’s kiss. Rebukable

speaker: ANTONY
text: And worthy shameful check it were to stand

speaker: ANTONY
text: On more mechanic compliment. I’ll leave thee

speaker: ANTONY
text: Now like a man of steel.—You that will fight,

speaker: ANTONY
text: Follow me close. I’ll bring you to ’t.—Adieu.

speaker: CHARMIAN
text: Please you retire to your chamber?

speaker: CLEOPATRA
text: Lead me.

speaker: CLEOPATRA
text: He goes forth gallantly. That he and Caesar might

speaker: CLEOPATRA
text: Determine this great war in single fight,

speaker: CLEOPATRA
text: Then Antony—but now—. Well, on.
